title: Imperial Entanglements (Star Wars Miniatures Battles)
content: {{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1|italics2=1}} {{Youmay|the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles]]'' sourcebook|the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]'' [[Imperial Entanglements (Star Wars Miniatures)|expansion]] or the [[Fantasy Flight Games]] ''[[Star Wars: The Card Game]]'' [[Imperial Entanglements (Star Wars: The Card Game)|deluxe expansion]]}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Imperial_Entanglements_Star_Wars_Minis_Supplement.jpg]] |title=''Imperial Entanglements'' |author=[[Stephen Crane]] |cover artist= |illustrator=[[Stephen Crane]], [[Brian Schomburg]] |editor=[[Bill Smith]] |publisher=[[West End Games]] |release date=Summer [[1996]]{{BookCite|title="Imperial Entanglements" Review|author=Rilstone, Andrew|container=''Arcane'' #7|date=June 1996}} |type=Paperback |pages= |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=087431271X |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Imperial Entanglements''''' was a supplement of scenarios for the ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles]]'' game. It was the second and final supplement for the game, published in 1996 by [[West End Games]]. In addition to the scenarios, the book contained a "Rules Clarifications and Upgrade," to explain and clarify ambiguities and oversights from the previously published rules. Among the new material provided in this section was an expansion of the [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]] character set to include common punctuation marks, and the inclusion of game statistics for the [[Storm Skimmer Patrol Sled|Storm Skimmer]], a vehicle introduced in the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' comic book. A section of Troop Lists also provides new troop types for use in the game, expanding on the original Troop Lists in ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles]]''. The bulk of the supplement consisted of nine scenarios for playing the game: *'''Scenario One: [[Big Game (scenario)|Big Game]]''' - A hunting party is hired to accompany retired corporate exec and wildlife collector [[Halor Dinnoral]] to an uncharted planet and aid him in acquiring some new specimens for his personal zoo. This is a solitaire scenario, providing rules to govern the arrival and behavior of an assortment of creatures during the game. *'''Scenario Two: [[Terror in the Trees]]''' - After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], stranded [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] launch a retaliatory assault on an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] village high in the forest canopy. The Ewoks must defend their village with the help of some visiting [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and an assortment of tricks and traps. *'''Scenario Three: [[Hammer of Destiny]]''' - Rebel forces of the [[Hitak Harriers]] and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] retrieval team battle across the [[Magma/Legends|lava]] plains of [[Turak IV]] in order to recover a damaged [[S-1 FireHawke Heavy Repulsortank]] of the famous [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Hell's Hammers]] regiment. *'''Scenario Four: [[A Bazaar Encounter]]''' - Rebel troops engaging in a bit of R&R at a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] bazaar find themselves involved in a little dust-up with some members of the [[Krayt Draggers]] [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]], while panicked Jawas scurry around underfoot. *'''Scenario Five: [[To Hunt the Hutt]]''' - [[Grim Destiny]], a team of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] led by [[Garm Trodask]], is on the hunt for [[Mennac Vanderijar|Mennac]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] of the criminal [[Vanderijar]] clan. They corner her, her consort [[Jobwah]], and their retinue in a [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]] on [[Trendivar|Trandivar]], and the battle is joined. *'''Scenario Six: [[Who Goes There?]]''' - In the dense jungles of [[Mentanar Vosk]], Rebel [[Strike Force Altagak]] has been effective in harrying the Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] there. When the garrison commander discovers their base of operations, he sends stormtroopers to eradicate the menace. Aware of this, the strike force heads for its escape shuttle. So begins a race to the Rebel base through the thick jungle. This scenario provides special rules for simulating the disorienting effects of moving through a thick jungle, so that the two sides are never really sure where they are headed. *'''Scenario Seven: [[Scavenger Hunt (scenario)|Scavenger Hunt]]''' - During an assault on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]], [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] troops must prevent a group of [[Scavenger/Legends|Scavengers]] from dismantling their transport, while contending with the scavengers, their war droid and a pack of [[Nek/Legends|nek]] battle beasts. *'''Scenario Eight: [[Rescue Run]]''' - A strike force of [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] [[Infiltrator (starfighter)|Infiltrators]] must find and rescue a Rebel operative from an Imperial field camp, where he is being held awaiting transport to an interrogation facility. *'''Scenario Nine: [[Surprise Visit]]''' - Rebel forces plan to ambush a [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies|Santhe/Sienar]] convoy on the planet [[Dennaskar]], with surprising results. This scenario was previously published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]]. ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[205.104/G3]] {{1st}} *[[343.245/H5]] {{1st}}
